channel.title: AI with Maris — Blog (English)
channel.description: A new article every day about AI in small and mid-sized businesses.

item.title: The 90-day test: how to set up an AI project that has to prove its value
item.description: An AI project that can’t show its value within 90 days usually never will. Here’s how to set up the test properly.

item.title: Why most AI projects in mid-sized companies start at the wrong end
item.description: Most AI projects don’t fail because of the technology. They fail because of the order of things. How to spot the right first project.

item.title: Understanding hallucinations: why AI confidently makes things up
item.description: AI models sometimes invent facts — with full conviction. Why that’s not a bug, when it gets dangerous and how to protect yourself.

item.title: Why your team doesn’t use AI tools — and what coaching changes
item.description: The tool is bought, the licences are running — and nobody uses it. What’s really behind it, and why a single training session changes nothing.

item.title: Make or buy in AI: when to build custom software, when a ready-made tool will do
item.description: Buy a finished tool or have one built? The answer hangs on a single question — and it has nothing to do with technology.

item.title: Your own cloud or US providers? Data sovereignty without dogma
item.description: Between “hand everything to Big Tech” and “host everything yourself” lies a sensible middle ground. A decision guide without the holy war.
